metadata.description: Local-first persistent semantic memory for Claude Code — plugin + language-agnostic codebase ingestion.

plugins.name: semantic-memory
plugins.description: Persistent semantic memory for Claude Code: low-latency per-prompt auto-recall via a warm HTTP server, project-scoped priming, pre-compaction capture, codebase ingestion, a memory-keeper subagent, and capture/curate/explore/sync skills. Backed by the local-first semantic-memory-mcp server (34 sm_* tools).
